description_long: This is a large, rustic barn structure with a steeply pitched gable roof and a prominent central stone chimney. The exterior features a combination of timber framing and stonework, with visible wooden beams supporting the overhanging eaves and porch areas. A large wooden windmill is attached to one side, suggesting agricultural or milling functionality. The barn sits on a grassy base, with a raised wooden entryway and multiple support posts. The roof is constructed from overlapping shingles, and the overall design is reminiscent of medieval or traditional European rural architecture. The structure appears spacious, with multiple entry points and architectural details that emphasize both utility and durability.
description: A large, timber-and-stone barn with a steep gable roof, central chimney, and attached windmill, featuring rustic architectural details and a raised entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a raised wooden porch, timber framing, and the central stone chimney behind.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the large windmill structure, with the stone chimney and roofline clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical gable roof, stonework, and secondary entry points.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing a wide staircase leading to a secondary entrance, with the roof and chimney in profile.
attribute_door_style: single large hinged door at the front, secondary door with staircase at the rear
attribute_window_arrangement: small windows irregularly placed on the sides and near entrances
attribute_architectural_style: traditional European rural barn with medieval influences
